messages.content: Which is the best product in perfumaria last year?

Run SQL: average freight value per line item for orders in SP

{"mode":"single","steps":[{"kind":"meta","tool":"query","args":{"sql":"SELECT AVG(oi.freight_value) AS avg_freight FROM olist_order_items_dataset oi JOIN olist_orders_dataset o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN olist_customers_dataset c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE c.customer_state = 'SP' LIMIT 1"}}]}
